AgentCommand.description:
One flag-2 command frame: {id, cmd, args}. The documented command
set of the frozen agent; AgentCommandRequest enforces the same set
server-side.
AgentCommand.title: AgentCommand

AgentCommandRequest.description:
Command relay body for POST /api/agent/command. `cmd` is enforced
against the frozen agent's command set.
AgentCommandRequest.title: AgentCommandRequest

AgentHello.description: The agent's flag-3 hello payload (frozen wire JSON).
AgentHello.title: AgentHello

ConfigState.description:
GET /api/config — the resolvable-path parts of the server config.
Also the PATCH response (the state after the update).
ConfigState.title: ConfigState

ConfigUpdate.description:
PATCH /api/config — every field optional; only provided fields
change. `binary: ""` clears the binary; `sysroot: ""` clears the
sysroot; the source mapper rebuilds once per request.
ConfigUpdate.title: ConfigUpdate

ConfigureMetricsArgs.description: configure_metrics: toggle opt-in collectors / interval on the agent.
ConfigureMetricsArgs.title: ConfigureMetricsArgs

DataVersion.description:
Version stamp for the notify-and-fetch cycle. Broadcast over SSE
(with event_types) and echoed by /api/snapshot (without).
DataVersion.title: DataVersion

ErrorResponse.description: Every non-2xx response renders as this envelope.
ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse

MetricsFrame.description:
One health-metrics snapshot from the agent (flag-4 frame). The
agent's shape varies by type and platform — modeled loosely on
purpose; `type` is system|process|network|disk|threads.
MetricsFrame.title: MetricsFrame

SSEAgentEvent.description: `agent` event: fired once per new agent session.
SSEAgentEvent.title: SSEAgentEvent

SSECatalog.description:
Not an endpoint — enumerates every event on GET /api/stream so the
payload models land in the OpenAPI components for TS generation.

Events: `status` (SSEStatusEvent), `agent` (SSEAgentEvent),
`data_version` (DataVersion, with event_types), `perf_stat` (dict),
`metrics` (MetricsFrame, discriminated by its `type` field).
SSECatalog.title: SSECatalog

StartArgs.description:
start: begin collection on a PID. `events` may narrow the probed
record-event set; frequency/duration override the agent defaults.
StartArgs.title: StartArgs

delete.description: Close the agent connection, triggering normal disconnect flow.

get.description: Current agent connection: address + hello (platform, version).

post.description: Relay a command to the managed agent.

get.description:
Browse the server filesystem for the wizard's binary/source pickers.
Confined to config.browse_root.

patch.description:
Update binary / source dir / path map / toolchain / sysroot in one
request; the source mapper rebuilds once.

get.description: Export the live in-memory profile (bounded by --max-samples).

schema.title: Response Api Metrics Current Api Metrics Current Get
Response Api Metrics History Api Metrics History Get

post.description: Import an uploaded perf.data file as a saved session.

get.description:
Rebuild session data on the fly from raw chunks (cached on disk —
sessions are immutable once saved).

Export a saved session: collapsed stacks, full JSON, or SVG
flamegraph (per event).

Pull the cached per-event snapshot (one event, or all). Pairs with
the 'data_version' SSE notify: browsers fetch only the event they're
viewing.
Return annotated source for a specific file. Optional tid filter.

Server-Sent Events endpoint for real-time updates.

Events: `status`, `agent`, `data_version` (carries event_types),
`perf_stat`, `metrics` (discriminated by its `type` field).
Overview of all threads with CPU breakdown.

Flamegraph + function summary restricted to samples received inside
[start, end] (unix seconds). Backs the UI's timeline scrubbing: samples
are stamped with arrival time, so a window on the Device Health
timeline maps to the profile chunks collected in that window. Bounded
by the raw-sample ring buffer (--max-samples).
